retrieved_result: Why Do Credit Cards Get Declined? Why Do Credit Cards Get Declined? July 16, 2015, Written By Jason Steele Don’t you hate it when you go to make a purchase, but your credit card is declined? It’s hard to tell what’s worse, the embarrassment of being presumed to be broke, or the lack of accurate information offered by the merchant. H
